title: eviCore - Prior Authorization for Radiology and Specialty Care
problem: High-cost specialty care and imaging requires prior authorization to ensure medical appropriateness. Manual review is slow and inconsistent.
solution: Specialty benefit management with prior authorization for radiology, cardiology, oncology, and other high-cost services. Clinical guidelines-based authorization decisions.
technology: Clinical guidelines, prior auth platform, utilization management
varden_fit: HIGH — eviCore proves specialty prior auth is a distinct market. European healthcare needs similar specialty-specific solutions.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Specialty prior auth is high-value. European systems lack specialty-specific authorization tools.
